prompt:
STYLE: a photorealistic LIFESTYLE PRODUCT SCENE with clean type and graphic-callout OVERLAYS on top. 1:1 square composition, 4K resolution. Editorial wellness-brand marketing aesthetic.

BACKGROUND SCENE (real photo): a soft warm flat-lay TOP-DOWN view on a sage-linen yoga mat, golden mid-morning natural light coming from the upper-left of the frame. Centered slightly off-axis: the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, front label fully legible, gold lid, jar closed) standing upright on the mat. Beside the jar: a small ceramic dish with 5-6 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES and 2 more cubes placed carefully in front of the jar's base (representing the daily dose). A folded soft white towel and a small water glass softly out-of-focus at the edges. Real-photo cinematic feel with soft sun glow on the jar's curves and a subtle shadow on the mat.

OVERLAYS — clean type and graphic elements composed ON TOP of the lifestyle photo:
  • TOP — large bold ALL-CAPS headline overlay in deep ink-black with a subtle white text-shadow: '2 GUMMIES. EVERY DAY.' (bold condensed display sans-serif). Smaller sub-headline beneath in clean white text on a slim teal underline: 'That's the whole routine.'
  • Around the jar — three small chip-style routine callouts (one upper-left, one upper-right, one lower-right) overlayed on top of the photo. Each is a small white-fill rounded rectangle with a thin teal outline containing a tiny flat teal icon and bold ALL-CAPS label:
     – upper-left: SUNRISE icon + 'MORNING OR ANYTIME'
     – upper-right: WATER GLASS icon + 'WITH WATER'
     – lower-right: CALENDAR icon + 'DAILY HABIT'
  • BELOW the jar — a thin gold dotted timeline strip overlay with four small milestone labels: 'DAY 1 · WEEK 1 · WEEK 2-4 · 4 WEEKS+' under tiny sub-labels in light-gray ('First taste · Improved digestion · Energy + glow · Sustained vitality').
  • BOTTOM — small tagline overlay: 'TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE' in tracked light-gray all-caps.

DESIGN SYSTEM (for overlays): muted TEAL/CYAN + warm GOLD/YELLOW + deep INK-BLACK type · bold ALL-CAPS condensed display sans-serif headlines, clean modern sans-serif body · NO script fonts · tiny flat outlined teal icons · all overlay elements composed on top of the real photograph.

ABSOLUTE RULES: all text cleanly spelled · 1:1 square 4K · realistic lifestyle photo background, NOT flat white · NO border/frame · reference image for jar appearance.
